title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: Between life and death there is a library, and within that library, the shelves go on forever. Every book provides a different life the protagonist could have lived.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship that teaches how to write readable, reusable, and maintainable code.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An accessible overview of cosmology, black holes, and the nature of time and space.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A fable about following your dreams and listening to your heart.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: David Thomas
description: Practical advice for software developers on how to become better at their craft.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A groundbreaking narrative of humanity's creation and evolution.

title: The Gene: An Intimate History
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
description: A magnificent history of the gene and the quest to decipher the master-code of instructions that makes and defines us.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
description: The big ideas behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A journey through space and time exploring the universe and our place in it.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A psychological thriller about a woman who shoots her husband and then never speaks again.

title: Python Crash Course
author: Eric Matthes
description: A fast-paced, comprehensive introduction to programming with Python.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: A science fiction epic set on the desert planet Arrakis.
